mapper.insert: insert into private_message (sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, create_time) values (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{isRead}, now())
mapper.select: select * from ( select pm.id, pm.sender_id as senderId, pm.receiver_id as receiverId, pm.content, pm.is_read as isRead, pm.create_time as createTime, u.nickname as senderNickname, u.avatar as senderAvatar, u.role_id as senderRoleId from private_message pm left join sys_user u on pm.sender_id = u.id where (pm.sender_id = #{userId} and pm.receiver_id = #{peerId}) or (pm.sender_id = #{peerId} and pm.receiver_id = #{userId}) order by pm.create_time desc, pm.id desc limit 30 ) recent_messages order by createTime asc, id asc

select peer.id as peerId, peer.username, peer.nickname, peer.avatar, peer.role_id as roleId, latest.content as lastContent, latest.create_time as lastTime, ( select count(*) from private_message unread where unread.sender_id = peer.id and unread.receiver_id = #{userId} and unread.is_read = 0 ) as unreadCount from ( select case when sender_id = #{userId} then receiver_id else sender_id end as peer_id, max(id) as last_id from private_message where sender_id = #{userId} or receiver_id = #{userId} group by peer_id ) session join private_message latest on latest.id = session.last_id join sys_user peer on peer.id = session.peer_id order by latest.create_time desc, latest.id desc

select pm.id, pm.sender_id as senderId, pm.receiver_id as receiverId, pm.content, pm.is_read as isRead, pm.create_time as createTime, u.nickname as senderNickname, u.avatar as senderAvatar, u.role_id as senderRoleId from private_message pm left join sys_user u on pm.sender_id = u.id where pm.id > #{afterId} and ((pm.sender_id = #{userId} and pm.receiver_id = #{peerId}) or (pm.sender_id = #{peerId} and pm.receiver_id = #{userId})) order by pm.id asc
select count(*) from private_message where receiver_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0
mapper.update: update private_message set is_read = 1 where receiver_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0
mapper.delete: delete from private_message where ((sender_id = #{userId} and receiver_id = #{peerId}) or (sender_id = #{peerId} and receiver_id = #{userId})) and id not in ( select id from ( select id from private_message where (sender_id = #{userId} and receiver_id = #{peerId}) or (sender_id = #{peerId} and receiver_id = #{userId}) order by create_time desc, id desc limit 30 ) recent_messages )
